items.title: Deep neural network training
items.description: Convolutional and transformer models on large datasets are trained almost exclusively with mini-batch SGD or SGD-based optimizers (Adam, AdamW), processing batches that fit GPU memory.

items.title: Large-scale linear and logistic models
items.description: Linear regression, logistic regression, and linear SVMs on millions of rows use mini-batch updates when full-batch matrix operations are too slow or memory-heavy.

items.title: Online and continual learning
items.description: Streaming settings apply SGD with batch size 1 or small micro-batches to adapt models as new labeled data arrives without storing the full history.

items.title: Distributed data-parallel training
items.description: Each worker computes gradients on its local mini-batch; gradients are averaged across workers before a synchronized SGD step, scaling training to multiple GPUs or nodes.
